ValidationRule.description: Ensures the the rejection reason is required when rejection filter is set to "Other"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Withdrawn") ), ISPICKVAL(Rejection_Filter__c, "Other (use Rejection Reason)"), LEN(TRIM(Rejection_Reason__c)) < 25 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please add more detail in Rejection Reason when Rejection Filter is “Other”.
